h1: New Construction Services in Land O Lakes, FL
intro: Build your dream home from the ground up in Land O Lakes, FL with Titan Homes Group. Complete design-build services from a fully licensed Florida General Contractor — FL #CBC1264713.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group offers full design-build services for new residential construction in Land O Lakes, FL. As a fully licensed Florida General Contractor (License #CBC1264713), we guide Land O Lakes homeowners through every phase of building a custom home — from land assessment and architectural design through construction, inspections, and final walkthrough.

Building a custom home in Land O Lakes is one of life's most significant decisions. Our design-build model gives you a single point of contact and full accountability from first sketch to move-in day. Our in-house design team creates detailed floor plans and 3D renderings so you can visualize your Land O Lakes dream home before construction begins.

Throughout the build, we coordinate all trades and subcontractors, maintain rigorous quality control, and provide transparent progress reporting. Our new construction team in Land O Lakes uses premium materials, energy-efficient building practices, and proven construction methods to deliver homes that are built to last and designed to perform in Florida's climate.

Titan Homes Group's reputation in Land O Lakes and throughout Tampa Bay is built on quality craftsmanship, honest communication, and a genuine commitment to bringing each client's vision to life.

faqs.question: How long does it take to build a custom home in Land O Lakes, FL?
faqs.answer: Custom home construction in Land O Lakes typically takes 8–18 months depending on design complexity, size, and permitting timeline. We provide a detailed construction schedule during the design phase so you can plan accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you offer design services for new construction in Land O Lakes?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our design-build model includes full architectural coordination, floor plan design, material selections, and 3D renderings. We handle design and construction as a unified team, saving you time and ensuring cohesive results.

faqs.question: What is your new construction warranty in Land O Lakes?
faqs.answer: Titan Homes Group provides a workmanship warranty on all new construction in Land O Lakes. We are also fully licensed, bonded, and insured, giving you comprehensive protection throughout the build process.
